Operation 'listGroupMembers' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable, but description is completely missing. Added details about pagination support, filtering/sorting capabilities, and explicit return type to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and capabilities.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all members in the specified group. Supports filtering and sorting options via query parameters. Returns a MemberListResponse containing member objects with their profile information and group-specific attributes.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable, but description is completely missing. Added details about pagination support, filtering/sorting capabilities, and explicit return type to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and capabilities.

message: Operation 'addGroupMember' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear, but description is missing. Added context about request schema, return value, and side effects (immediate group access) to clarify what happens when a member is added.

data.description_suggestion: Adds a new member to the specified group. Accepts a MemberCreateRequest containing member details. Returns the created Member object with assigned ID and group membership details. The member is immediately added to the group and can access group resources based on their role.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear, but description is missing. Added context about request schema, return value, and side effects (immediate group access) to clarify what happens when a member is added.

message: Operation 'getGroupMember' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable. Description is missing but needed to explain the dual ID requirement and what member information is returned.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific member within a group. Requires both group ID and member ID. Returns a Member object containing the member's profile information, group role, and membership status.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description is missing but needed to explain the dual ID requirement and what member information is returned.

message: Operation 'updateGroupMember' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is adequate but generic. Description is missing entirely. Added details about what can be updated, request schema, return value, and side effects regarding permission changes.

data.description_suggestion: Updates member information or group role for a specific member. Accepts a MemberUpdateRequest with fields to modify (e.g., role, status, custom attributes). Returns the updated Member object. Changes take effect immediately and may affect the member's group permissions.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but generic. Description is missing entirely. Added details about what can be updated, request schema, return value, and side effects regarding permission changes.

message: Operation 'removeGroupMember' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear but description is missing. Added context about dual ID requirement, immediate access revocation, return value, and data retention policy to help AI agents understand the operation's effects.

data.description_suggestion: Removes a member from the specified group. Requires both group ID and member ID. The member loses access to group resources immediately. Returns a success response confirming the removal. The member record is retained for audit purposes but is no longer active in the group.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing. Added context about dual ID requirement, immediate access revocation, return value, and data retention policy to help AI agents understand the operation's effects.

message: Operation 'searchGroupMembers' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and actionable. Description is missing but needed to explain search capabilities, supported filter types, and return format.
